entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A group of people with a particular purpose, such as a company, institution, or association.

entity_types.name: Technology
entity_types.description: A product, system, or method resulting from scientific knowledge for practical purposes.

entity_types.name: AI
entity_types.description: An artificial intelligence entity or system.

entity_types.name: ResearchField
entity_types.description: A specific area of academic or scientific study.

entity_types.name: Foundation
entity_types.description: An organization established to provide funding for charitable or research purposes.

relation_groups.name: Organizational Structure
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the structure and roles within organizations.

relations.name: works_at
relations.description: A person is employed by or affiliated with an organization.

relations.name: leads
relations.description: A person holds a leadership position within an organization.

relations.name: specializes_in
relations.description: A person has expertise in a particular research field.

relation_groups.name: Technology Development
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the creation, refinement, and application of technologies.

relations.name: develops
relations.description: A person creates or invents a technology.

relations.name: refines
relations.description: A person improves or enhances a technology.

relations.name: uses
relations.description: A person utilizes a technology.

relations.name: collaborates_on
relations.description: A person works together with others on a technology.

relations.name: applies_to
relations.description: A technology is used within a specific research field.

relation_groups.name: Organizational Actions
relation_groups.description: Relations describing actions taken by organizations regarding technologies or individuals.

relations.name: monitors
relations.description: An organization observes or keeps track of a person's activities.

relations.name: acquires_rights_to
relations.description: An organization obtains exclusive rights to a technology.

relations.name: deploys
relations.description: An organization implements or puts a technology into operation.

relations.name: establishes
relations.description: An organization creates or founds a foundation.
relations.detail: established the Free Neural Network Foundation

relation_groups.name: Location and Infrastructure
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the location of entities and the infrastructure they utilize.

relations.name: located_in
relations.description: An organization is situated in a specific location.
relations.detail: located in the heart of Neo-Paris's technological district

relations.name: relocates_to
relations.description: A person moves to a different location.
relations.detail: relocated her critical research materials and equipment to this underground facility

relations.name: built_in
relations.description: A location was constructed within another, larger location.
relations.detail: beneath the ruins of Old Paris

relation_groups.name: Human-AI Interaction
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the interaction and partnership between humans and artificial intelligence.

relations.name: partnered_with
relations.description: A person forms a partnership or collaboration with an AI.
relations.detail: relationship with ARIES evolved into a unique partnership

relations.name: interfaces_with
relations.description: A person connects or interacts directly with an AI system.
relations.detail: interface human minds with artificial intelligence networks

relation_groups.name: Research and Development
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the process of scientific inquiry and technological advancement.

relations.name: conducts
relations.description: An organization performs research in a specific field.

relations.name: contributes_to
relations.description: A person makes significant contributions to a research field.
relations.detail: made significant contributions to the field

relations.name: explores
relations.description: A person investigates or studies a research field.
relations.detail: explored the intersection of quantum mechanics and human thought

relation_groups.name: Technology Impact
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the effects or consequences of technology.

relations.name: causes
relations.description: A technology is the cause of an event.
relations.detail: The legacy of the Neural Link Protocol was complex.

relation_groups.name: Temporal Relations
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the timing or sequence of events.

relations.name: occurred_in
relations.description: An event took place in a specific location.
relations.detail: beneath the ruins of Old Paris
